summary: DHH shares a brief personal post promoting his kid brother Jonas's upcoming skate movie called Adapt. He links to the trailer and praises the quality of the editing and skating skills on display. The post is a simple family shout-out with no technical or business content.
key_points: DHH's brother Jonas is releasing a skate movie called Adapt
A 46-second trailer is available for preview
DHH praises both the skaters' skills and the filmmaking quality
money_quotes: It's very cool, very well cut, and showing off some impressive skills from both skaters and movie maker.
key_insight: A short personal post promoting his brother's skate movie, with no broader tech or business relevance.
